server/tests/test_webp_codec.py :: test_parse_output_format_webp
def test_parse_output_format_webp() -> None:
    target = parse_output_format("webp")
    assert target is not None
    assert target.mime == "image/webp"
    assert target.extension == "webp"

server/tests/test_webp_codec.py :: test_encode_and_decode_webp_roundtrip
def test_encode_and_decode_webp_roundtrip() -> None:
    raster = solid_raster(18, 14, 90, 120, 150)
    payload = encode_webp(raster, quality=80)
    assert payload[0:4] == b"RIFF"
    assert payload[8:12] == b"WEBP"
    decoded = decode_webp(payload)
    assert decoded.width == 18
    assert decoded.height == 14

server/tests/test_webp_codec.py :: test_convert_png_to_webp_under_budget
def test_convert_png_to_webp_under_budget() -> None:
    raster = gradient_raster(32, 24)
    output = convert_raster(raster, OutputFormat("image/webp", "webp"), max_mb=1)
    assert output[8:12] == b"WEBP"
    assert len(output) > 20

server/tests/test_webp_codec.py :: test_load_webp_from_png_pipeline
def test_load_webp_from_png_pipeline() -> None:
    source = png_bytes(gradient_raster(20, 16))
    webp = convert_raster(
        load_raster_from_bytes(source, "input.png"),
        OutputFormat("image/webp", "webp"),
        max_mb=1,
    )
    raster = load_raster_from_bytes(webp, "output.webp")
    assert raster.width == 20
    assert raster.height == 16

server/tests/test_webp_codec.py :: test_decode_image_accepts_webp_magic
def test_decode_image_accepts_webp_magic() -> None:
    payload = webp_bytes(solid_raster(10, 10, 40, 80, 120))
    raster = decode_image(payload)
    assert raster.width == 10
    assert raster.height == 10
